goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 09:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should depart from 'stevenage'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 09:15 and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on thursday and should depart from stevenage
Make sure you get travel time
